svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Multi-modal RAG · LangGraph ReAct (CugaAgent variant ready) · 5 inline tools · per-session isolation · port 28802
FILE TYPES THE AGENT'S extract_and_index TOOL DISPATCHES ON · transcription runs INSIDE the tool call, not as a pre-step
↓ each file becomes a parameter to the agent's extract_and_index(filepath) tool call · Whisper runs inside that call
PIPELINE · HTTP API → PER-SESSION STATE → LANGGRAPH AGENT → RAG & SLIDE BUILD → OUTPUTS

g.text: isolated KB, queue, slides — runs concurrent safely
"6-step process: DISCOVER → INGEST → ASSESS → STRUCTURE → BUILD → FINALIZE"
Hard rules: title ≤6 words · 2–4 speaker-note sentences · synthesise across sources, never repeat.
5 INLINE @tool DEFS · closed over the session
UI consumes these to render live progress: file-by-file extraction, chunk counts, slides as they're built.

svg.text: AGENT'S 6-STEP PROCESS · encoded in the system prompt

slide list, queue). MCP tools must be
when the agent picks an audio/video file —
the LLM decides what's worth transcribing.
slides. Two users generating decks at
App is thin: HTTP + SSE only.
decided by the LLM in the ReAct loop.
